response:
Here are the ingredients for a basic salad:

**Leafy Greens:**
[ ] Lettuce ( Romaine, Iceberg, or your preferred type)

**Vegetables:**

[ ] Cherry tomatoes
[ ] Cucumber
[ ] Carrots
[ ] Bell peppers
[ ] Onions

**Protein:**

[ ] Grilled chicken
[ ] Canned tuna
[ ] Hard-boiled eggs
[ ] Tofu
[ ] Beans (black, kidney, or cannellini)

**Cheese:**

[ ] Cheddar
[ ] Feta
[ ] Parmesan
[ ] Goat cheese
[ ] Mozzarella

**Crunchy Toppings:**

[ ] Croutons
[ ] Nuts (walnuts, almonds, or pecans)
[ ] Seeds (pumpkin, sunflower, or sesame)

**Dressing:**

[ ] Vinaigrette
[ ] Ranch
[ ] Caesar
[ ] Greek yogurt-based dressing
[ ] Olive oil and lemon juice

**Optional:**

[ ] Avocado
[ ] Sprouts (alfalfa or broccoli)
[ ] Fresh herbs (parsley, basil, or cilantro)
[ ] Grilled or roasted vegetables (zucchini, eggplant, or sweet potatoes)
